name: @crguezl/ebnf-parser
description: A parser for BNF and EBNF grammars used by jison

scripts.build: node __patch_version_in_js.js && jison -m es bnf.y bnf.l && mv bnf.js parser.js && jison -m es ebnf.y && mv ebnf.js transform-parser.js && mkdir -p dist && rollup -c && babel dist/ebnf-parser-cjs.js -o dist/ebnf-parser-cjs-es5.js && babel dist/ebnf-parser-umd.js -o dist/ebnf-parser-umd-es5.js
scripts.clean: rm -f parser.js && rm -f transform-parser.js && rm -f bnf.js && rm -f ebnf.js && rm -rf dist/
scripts.superclean: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules/ && rm -f package-lock.json
